title: Return-Fraud Scoring × Postcode IMD (Ethically Framed) (Retail)
summary: Police.uk shoplifting + DLUHC IMD 2019 LSOA dataset both reachable; ethical framing of recipe is a deployment-policy concern, not a data-availability concern.
